questions.prompt: What is the difference between an active object and a passive object?
options: An active object controls a passive object.
An active object does not have a thread of control; a passive object has a thread of control.
An active object executes in a distributed system; a passive object executes in a centralized system.
An active object has a thread of control; a passive object does not have a thread of control.
questions.explanation: Active object có LUỒNG THỰC THI (thread) riêng, tự chạy độc lập; passive object không có thread riêng, chỉ được gọi/thao tác bởi object khác.

questions.prompt: What is an event-driven input task?
options: A task that executes every few seconds
A task that controls other tasks
A task that receives inputs from an external device when it generates interrupts
A task that checks whether there is new input from an external device
questions.explanation: Event-driven task được kích hoạt khi thiết bị ngoài phát sinh ngắt (interrupt) — task 'thức dậy' ngay khi có sự kiện phần cứng xảy ra.

options: A task that responds to each message it receives
A task that is activated by a timer event
A task that is activated by an external event
A task that is activated by an input event
questions.explanation: Periodic task được kích hoạt định kỳ bởi một bộ đếm thời gian (timer), lặp lại theo chu kỳ cố định.

options: A task that responds to each message it receives
A task that is activated by an internal message or event from another task
A task that is activated by an external event
A task that is activated by an input event
questions.explanation: Demand-driven task chỉ được kích hoạt khi nhận message/event từ MỘT TASK KHÁC bên trong hệ thống, không phải từ thiết bị ngoài hay timer.

options: A task that control other tasks
A task that executes a statechart
A task that executes on demand
A task that controls I/O devices
questions.explanation: Control task là task thực thi một STATECHART để điều khiển hành vi hệ thống dựa trên trạng thái.

questions.prompt: What is a user interaction task?
options: A task that interacts with I/O devices
A task that interacts with users
A task that interacts with a user sequentially
A task that interacts with a user concurrently
questions.explanation: User interaction task giao tiếp với NGƯỜI DÙNG theo trình tự (sequentially) — xử lý từng yêu cầu người dùng lần lượt.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is true for a Centralized Control architectural pattern?
options: Control is divided among various control components.
It provides the overall control and sequencing of the system.
It provides overall control by coordinating several control components.
It provides overall control over various I/O objects
questions.explanation: Centralized Control: có MỘT thành phần trung tâm duy nhất điều khiển và sắp xếp trình tự (sequencing) toàn hệ thống.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is true for a Distributed Control architectural pattern?
options: Control is divided among various control components.
It responds to multiple requests from client subsystems.
It provides overall control by coordinating several control components.
It provides distributed control over various I/O objects
questions.explanation: Distributed Control: quyền điều khiển được CHIA SẺ ra nhiều control component khác nhau, không tập trung vào một nơi.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is true for a Hierarchical Control architectural pattern?
options: Control is divided among various control components.
It provides overall control over several client subsystems.
It provides overall control by coordinating several control components.
It provides overall control over various I/O objects.
questions.explanation: Hierarchical Control: có một control component cấp cao ĐIỀU PHỐI nhiều control component cấp thấp hơn theo cấu trúc phân tầng.

questions.prompt: Which of the following is NOT a case of event synchronization?
options: External event
Internal event
Timer event
User event
questions.explanation: Trong danh sách external/internal/timer/user event, 'user event' KHÔNG được xem là một loại đồng bộ hóa sự kiện chuẩn — ba loại còn lại mới là các case chính.
